0168.note: F-N29 mitigation — pg_cron + pg_net liveness driver. Replaces daily-only Vercel Hobby crons with 3 DB-side jobs: heartbeat every 1 min, task-pickup every 5 min, notifications-drain every 5 min (offset 2 min). CRON_SECRET read at call-time from harness_config. Applied to prod via Supabase MCP.
